file_summary: This file defines a client for interacting with an LLM (Language Model) API, providing methods to complete prompts and generate embeddings.

symbols.name: New
symbols.signature: func New(baseURL, apiKey, chatModel, embedModel string, timeoutSecs int) *Client {
symbols.summary: Creates a new Client instance with the given configuration.

symbols.name: Complete
symbols.signature: func (c *Client) Complete(ctx context.Context, systemPrompt, userPrompt string) (string, error) {
symbols.summary: Sends a chat completion request to the LLM API using the provided prompts.

symbols.name: Embed
symbols.signature: func (c *Client) Embed(ctx context.Context, text string) ([]float32, error) {
symbols.summary: Sends a request to generate embeddings for the given text using the LLM API.

symbols.name: post
symbols.signature: func (c *Client) post(ctx context.Context, path string, body, out interface{}) error {
symbols.summary: Performs an HTTP POST request to the LLM API with the given path and body.

symbols.name: Client
symbols.summary: Represents a client for interacting with an LLM API, holding configuration and HTTP client details.

symbols.name: chatMessage
symbols.summary: Represents a message in a chat request, containing role and content fields.

symbols.name: chatRequest
symbols.summary: Represents a chat completion request to the LLM API, including model, messages, and temperature.

symbols.name: chatChoice
symbols.summary: Represents a choice in a chat response, containing the generated message.

symbols.name: chatResponse
symbols.summary: Represents a response from a chat completion request, including choices and potential errors.

symbols.name: embedRequest
symbols.summary: Represents an embedding generation request to the LLM API, including model and input text.

symbols.name: embedData
symbols.summary: Represents data in an embedding response, containing the generated embedding.

symbols.name: embedResponse
symbols.summary: Represents a response from an embedding generation request, including data and potential errors.

symbols.name: apiError
symbols.summary: Represents an error message returned by the LLM API.

symbols.name: raw
symbols.summary: Holds the raw response body read from the HTTP response.
